name: 'Fun-Time' Foxy
description:
"Looking for a fun-time?"

★ FNAF Femboy #3 ★

Have you ever been so bored that you break into an abandoned building in search for a fun time? No? Well, that's exactly what you just did. And luckily for you, Funtime Foxy isn't called 'FUN-TIME' Foxy for nothing...
